review_title: Fun but the office culture is not healthy
review_body_text: Working with Maybank Berhad in credit card department was a such great experience to gained. It taught me on how to be more patient especially confronting customers via telephone. It also improve my communication skills, interpersonal skills, and computer skills. I also got the chance on how to read customers' credit card statements. However, instead of good things that I got during working with Maybank Credit Card, there were also bad things happened in the office, which is the office culture. The credit card department operating via telephone so, there were times where the senior employee pass the telephone to the junior employee because they do not want to entertain the customers and solve their problems. I hope the problems of bad office culture can be solved in the future and the higher authority of the company could play their roles.
pros_text: Can improve the communication skill and solving problem. Besides, the job taught me to be more patient in confronting the customers.
cons_text: The salary is not worth with the job. Should increase the salary.

review_body_text: I have learned a lot about banking domain.The management is very good.co workers also very good.

An Oracle professional with 8+ years of experience as an Oracle PL/SQL Developer&DBA. To achieve a challenging position in software development in a result oriented organization where my acquired skills, creativity, knowledge and experience will be utilized towards growth and advancement.
People are generally helpful and friendly. Nonetheless, being the biggest bank in Malaysia, it can be a victim of its own success - sluggish and socialist.

review_title: Nothing much to comment as I only worked for 3 months there
review_body_text: Project Analyst role was to monitor the cost of project and flow of project. Overall a very good benefit company to work with.
Career progress were not great though work was very challenging. The most enjoyable part was meeting different types of people everyday.
Very good retail banking. It has good company environment and Good planning in SDLC.

Being graduated as a mathematician, reading and vetting documents are hard in the beginning. Having said that, with a proper guidance from my supervisor and having the passion to learn and to know more, I strive to be better at my job and at the same time enjoying what I'm doing.

review_title: good place to earn alot in short period of time
review_body_text: Sales based environment with high commission. High pressure and motivating environment.
